title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ABB India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ABB India Capital India:
ABB India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India Capital India!
